title: updates to Glassbox
summary:
been working on Glassbox for my research. i added gpu selection support today. also fixed the threading so exact-match works better now. added some skip heuristics to make the search faster. it was taking too long before.

i also wrote the readme file. it explains how to use the framework. hope it helps others understand my code. still have more to fix but this is a good start for the project.
commitMessages: feat: Add comprehensive README documentation for Glassbox framework
Add GPU device selection, exact‑match threading, and skip heuristics
